topActions.title: Build Take-Home Pay Calculator
topActions.rationale: annual salary to net income calculator with tax and social insurance breakdown. CPC tier: high; potential: high; effort: medium; policy risk: medium. Income and tax tools can attract higher-value finance queries than generic developer utilities.

topActions.title: Build Overtime Pay Calculator
topActions.rationale: calculate overtime pay from hourly wage, monthly salary, and premium rate. CPC tier: high; potential: high; effort: medium; policy risk: medium. Labor and salary queries have stable search demand and stronger commercial advertiser fit.

topActions.title: Build Electricity Cost Calculator
topActions.rationale: calculate appliance electricity cost from watts, usage time, and kWh rate. CPC tier: medium; potential: medium; effort: low; policy risk: low. This is a lower-risk calculator that can be implemented deterministically and broaden traffic.

topActions.title: Build Furusato Tax Limit Calculator
topActions.rationale: estimate furusato tax donation limit from income and family profile. CPC tier: high; potential: high; effort: high; policy risk: medium. Tax-saving queries are monetizable, but the calculation needs careful testing and disclaimers.

topActions.title: Build Mortgage Prepayment Calculator
topActions.rationale: compare mortgage balance, interest savings, and repayment-period reduction. CPC tier: high; potential: high; effort: high; policy risk: medium. Mortgage queries can have strong RPM, but the tool needs accurate amortization logic.
